task_id.description: Stable identifier for the generated task plan.

task_type.description: Task category accepted by the executor.

object_name.description: Object to manipulate, or empty string for unsupported tasks.

source_location.description: Source location for the object, or empty string for unsupported tasks.

target_location.description: Destination location for the object, or empty string for unsupported tasks.

steps.description: Ordered list of executor-supported step names.
